Strive Asset Management Exceeds Half a Billion in AUM, 3 Months After Launch

holdings.infoBox: STXK is an equity ETF with a total of 602 individual holdings. The top holdings are Applied Optoelectronics stock at 0.64%, DigitalOcean Holdings at 0.63%, Viavi Solutions at 0.53%, FormFactor at 0.52%, and Arrow Electronics at 0.51%.

overview.description: The Strive Small-Cap ETF (STXK) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg US 600 index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of the 600 smallest US companies in the Bloomberg US 1500 Index. STXK was launched on Nov 11, 2022 and is issued by Alpha Architect.

data.title: Nine Strive funds will move primary listing from NYSE Arca, Inc. and NASDAQ Stock Market LLC to New York Stock Exchange
data.text: HAVERTOWN, Pa. , Jan. 9, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- (ETF Architect) -- EA Series Trust announces that the following funds will move their primary listings to the New York Stock Exchange: Strive U.S. Energy ...

data.title: Strive Asset Management Announces Changes to Strive 2000 ETF
data.text: HAVERTOWN, Pa. , Jan.12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Strive Asset Management, LLC announced two changes to its Strive 2000 ETF (NASDAQ: STXK).

data.title: Strive Asset Management Exceeds Half a Billion in AUM, 3 Months After Launch
data.text: COLUMBUS, Ohio--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Strive Asset Management announced its total assets under management surpassed $500 million on November 11, 2022, three months after the launch of its first fund.
